data.content: Implementation review result: needs changes. 1. Scoped UI review passed: the Conversation Log and interaction picker styling in src/components/agent-history-view.tsx and src/components/interaction-picker.tsx uses larger type and stronger terminal-style contrast, with no obvious behavior regression in the reviewed surface. 2. Required sanity gates failed, so the knot cannot advance: bunx tsc --noEmit fails on Storybook files under work/, including work/foolery-c355/src/stories/beat-form.stories.tsx:44 (invalid isLoading prop), repeated invalid story args in work/foolery-d486 and work/foolery-ee66, and a missing module in work/*/src/stories/beat-status-badge.stories.tsx. 3. bun run build fails on the same type errors. 4. bun run test passes with 2172 passing tests. Return to implementation to clear the repo-level type/build failures before resubmitting.
